title: Updates are lost
poc: UPDATE aap SET id=2 WHERE id=1;
UPDATE aap SET id=7 WHERE id=8;
key_bug_features: Updating rows with existing values causes data loss
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id int PRIMARY KEY, value varchar(255), active boolean DEFAULT TRUE);
UPDATE test_table SET value = 'updated' WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_table SET id = 2 WHERE id = 3;
